event: Symptom onset of presumed index case
WHO alerted to high-mortality unknown illness
Four health workers die within four days at Mongbwalu General Referral Hospital
INRB Kinshasa confirms Bundibugyo virus (8 of 13 samples positive)
Uganda MoH confirms imported case (Congolese man died in Kampala)
Second imported case confirmed in Kampala
American missionary physician tests positive; evacuated to Germany
Africa CDC declares Public Health Emergency of Continental Security
US Title 42 style entry restrictions invoked
ECDC activates EU Health Task Force
WHO DG media briefing: 51 confirmed DRC + 2 Uganda; ~600 suspected
IHR Emergency Committee issues temporary recommendations
DRC totals: 85 confirmed (incl 2 Uganda); 746 suspected; 10 deaths
DRC totals: 121 confirmed (17 deaths); 1077 suspected (238 deaths); Uganda 7 confirmed (1 death)
